outlook.volatilityExpectation: Subdued intraday (Positive 0DTE GEX) with high structural risk (Negative Weekly/Monthly GEX)
outlook.summary: Market is trapped between positive 0DTE Gamma (stability) and heavily negative structural Gamma (volatility). The 640 strike is a massive structural anchor. Spot hovers near Max Pain (657), suggesting intraday pinning, but the heavy Put skew and negative Weekly/Monthly GEX imply significant downside risk if support levels fail.

levels.motivazione: Massive Open Interest concentration across all expiries (127k Weekly, 106k Monthly). Primary structural support.
0DTE Gamma Flip (656.78) aligns with Max Pain (657). Positive GEX here acts as a price magnet.
Dominant Call Open Interest in Weekly expiry (29k OI). Key short-term resistance.
Highest Call OI in 0DTE (21k). Hard resistance for immediate upside.
